calibrationBasis.promotedHandle: parhelion horizontal offset = R22 / cos(h); see /h-of-x
calibrationBasis.parhelicBeltVerticalOffset: decorative (flat through sun); the earlier -0.05 R22 belt-tilt rule was falsified and is not asserted

protectedLayers.rule: Keep the sun centered inside the 22 deg halo. Scale as a group only.
This is the iris. Do not decenter it from the sun.
Glints sit on the parhelic belt at the sun-altitude-derived parhelion offset.
Flat decorative band through the sun. Do NOT reintroduce a calibrated vertical offset; the earlier -0.05 R22 belt-tilt rule was falsified (see docs/PHASE10_ATTACK_ROADMAP.md).
Treat as the eyelid gesture. It can blink/reveal but should not detach from the halo system.

optionalLayers.use: Annotation and education only until stronger multi-photo support.
Annotation only; not a default logo feature.
Rich-display variant only; omit from small marks.

motionStates.idle: Slow sun breathing plus belt shimmer.
motionStates.activeReveal: Draw the parhelic belt, then light the parhelia.
motionStates.hover: Increase parhelion opacity and slide glints outward by 6-10 px.
motionStates.labelCallout: Pulse one layer at a time using data-layer ids.
motionStates.reducedMotion: Use the static SVG; no opacity cycling or translation.

smallSizeRules.16-32px: Sun, 22 deg halo, and parhelia only.
smallSizeRules.48-180px: Add 46 deg halo and a simplified upper tangent.
smallSizeRules.192px+: Full default mark, including parhelic belt and optional CZA if contrast survives.
